title: Org-chart / hierarchy tree report
description: Data contract for the org-chart format: a top-down node tree (org chart, taxonomy, work-breakdown structure, or decision tree) rendered as a root node with child rows connected by CSS-drawn connector lines. Each node is a compact rounded card. The renderer reads exactly these fields, builds the DOM, and wires collapse/expand, focus/reset, expand-all/collapse-all, and search interactions. The sample's #report-data is the canonical instance of this schema.

meta.description: Shared report chrome metadata (brand-neutral). org/project stay as {{…}} placeholders unless real values are supplied.

org.description: Owning organisation. Keep the literal placeholder {{ORG}} when brand-neutral.

project.description: Project / programme name. Keep the literal placeholder {{PROJECT}} when brand-neutral.

reportType.description: Short label for the kind of hierarchy (e.g. 'Org Chart', 'Work-Breakdown Structure', 'Decision Tree', 'Taxonomy').

subtitle.description: Optional one-line standfirst / scope note shown beside the title.

date.description: As-of date (ISO yyyy-mm-dd or display string).

author.description: Preparer. Keep the literal placeholder {{AUTHOR}} when brand-neutral.

theme.description: Initial brand theme; sets <html data-theme>. Default for this format is indigo.

orientation.description: Tree growth direction. 'vertical' (default) = top-down, child rows beneath the parent. 'horizontal' = left-to-right, children to the right of the parent.

legend.description: Optional legend rows mapping a status to a human label, rendered in the toolbar. Omit to fall back to the default ok/risk/hold/neutral legend.

status.description: Which status dot this row explains.

label.description: What that status means in this tree.

root.description: The single top node of the hierarchy. Its 'children' recurse to form the whole tree. Recommended depth 3–4, ~15–20 nodes total.

node.description: One node of the tree, rendered as a compact rounded card. May contain children that recurse with the same shape.

id.description: Stable unique node id (used as the DOM key and for collapse/focus state). Must be unique across the whole tree.

name.description: Primary node label — a person, team, deliverable, option, or category. Shown as the card title.

role.description: Optional secondary line under the name (a role, owner, classification, or one-line descriptor).

meta.description: Optional short metric / chip shown on the card (e.g. headcount, weight, %, count). Keep it terse — one token.

status.description: Status dot colour and semantics. 'neutral' (or omitted) renders a grey dot.

badge.description: Optional tracked-mono badge / tag on the card (e.g. a code, region, or category tag).

collapsed.description: Optional initial state: if true, this node renders with its subtree collapsed on load.

children.description: Child nodes (recurse). Omit or empty for a leaf.
